description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: As operators of the Keel Liquidity Layer, Keel automatically inherits, and is subject to, the base class of operational requirements related to Total Risk Capital management defined in [A.2.
.9.1.1.3.2.1.2 - Primes’ Total Risk Capital (TRC) Management](3af8a3a2-25e5-44b3-87a4-7df1f2712685). Modifications to the base operational logic automatically propagate to the Keel Artifact.

As operators of the Keel Liquidity Layer, Keel automatically inherits, and is subject to, the base class of operational requirements related to Total Risk Capital management defined in [A.2.2.9.1.1.3.2.1.2 - Primes
Total Risk Capital (TRC) Management](3af8a3a2-25e5-44b3-87a4-7df1f2712685). Modifications to the base operational logic automatically propagate to the Keel Artifact.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
